title: Respawnable Friends
description: Addon for Respawnable Pets allowing configurable non-pets to respawn
body:
Simple addon for [Respawnable Pets](https://modrinth.com/mod/respawnable-pets) allowing certain, configurable nontameable entities to respawn. By default, this only includes goats, but may be configured through the respawnablefriends:can_respawn entity tag.

Entities allowed to respawn still need to be right-clicked on with the Etheric Gem, as usual.
